fields.acceptance_criteria: 1. The separate right details panel is removed. 2. The floating content panel gains the interactive action + edit capabilities previously only in the details panel. 3. The content-panel header is compact and does not spill across the full screen before the main body. 4. Non-essential metadata is relocated to a content-panel footer. 5. No functionality regresses relative to the removed details panel.
fields.title: [ticket-viewer] Consolidate detail panel into content panel (compact header, inline edit, metadata footer)

fields.impl_status: W1 UI redesign not yet started. Discovered and depends_on bug f2d19fdc (wasm build regression) which is now fixed and compile-validated. W1 browser verification (a mandatory gate for this frontend change) is currently BLOCKED by an environment gap: memory-viewers/viewer-api is empty (no gitlink), so `viewer-ctl prepare ticket-viewer` fails on missing shared CSS assets (variables.css). W1 cannot legitimately reach in-review until the environment is repaired so the app can be built and visually verified. See .test/default/executions/exec-vt-ticket-viewer-wasm-build-regression-20260710-trunk-env-blocker.json.

fields.impl_status: W1 UI redesign not yet started; blocked. depends_on bug f2d19fdc (wasm build regression), now fixed and compile-validated (wasm32 + profile-browser, EXIT 0). W1 browser verification (mandatory gate for this frontend change) is BLOCKED by an environment gap: memory-viewers/viewer-api is an empty non-gitlinked dir, so `viewer-ctl prepare ticket-viewer` fails on missing shared CSS assets (variables.css); `./install-tools.sh` last exited 1. W1 cannot reach in-review until the env is repaired and the app can be built + visually verified. Evidence: .test/default/executions/exec-vt-ticket-viewer-wasm-build-regression-20260710-trunk-env-blocker.json.
fields.title: [ticket-viewer] Consolidate detail panel into content panel (compact header, inline edit, metadata footer)

fields.impl_status: W1 UI redesign not yet started; now UNBLOCKED. Build prerequisite done: bug f2d19fdc (wasm regression) fixed + compile-validated, AND the environment blocker resolved by adding the memory-viewers/viewer-api submodule (@ 47e0aa45) so `viewer-ctl prepare ticket-viewer` builds the frontend end-to-end (EXIT 0). Browser verification is now possible. Ready for W1 implementation once bug f2d19fdc is reviewed/closed. Scope: panels.rs, ticket_content/{page,render}.rs, list/page.rs (embed TicketDetail as content footer, compact header, metadata footer), plus updating the two e2e-release specs that assert ticket-detail-panel.
